title: saxifraga occidentalis subsp. rufidula
intro: Saxifraga occidentalis subsp. rufidula is a subspecies of saxifrage, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifragaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially lowering blood pressure, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Saxifraga occidentalis subsp. rufidula include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for its medicinal properties.
